title: axonopus aureus
intro: Axonopus aureus, also known as the golden bluestem or golden grass, is a species of grass native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Axonopus aureus include its potential to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
